pkgmetadata.longdescription: Claude Desktop is the official desktop application for Claude, an AI assistant by Anthropic. This binary package repackages the official Linux build maintained by the upstream community.

use.flag: Pull in dev-util/claude-code so the bundled Claude Code integration can spawn the CLI
On Wayland sessions, add media-gfx/gnome-screenshot for Computer Use screenshots under GNOME
Add x11-misc/ydotool for Computer Use input automation on Wayland (requires ydotoold daemon running)
Add media-gfx/scrot, x11-misc/wmctrl, and x11-misc/xdotool for Computer Use screenshots, window detection, and input on X11
